# Inkscape MCP

> **Inkscape MCP** is a FastMCP **3.1+** server that drives the **Inkscape CLI** for SVG and vector workflows. Agents use portmanteau tools (`inkscape_file`, `inkscape_vector`, `inkscape_analysis`, `inkscape_system`) plus optional **sampling/agentic** tools when the host supports `ctx.sample()`. Transports: **stdio** and **HTTP** (`MCP_PORT`, default **10847**); optional **REST** `/api/*` and **Vite** dashboard (**10846**) when you run the web stack.

**Full detail:** see [`llms-full.txt`](llms-full.txt) for every tool operation, environment variables, run commands, troubleshooting, and MCP config snippets.

## Quick links

- [README.md](README.md) — overview and doc table
- [docs/INSTALL.md](docs/INSTALL.md) — clone → `uv sync` → run
- [docs/IDE_MCP.md](docs/IDE_MCP.md) — Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Desktop patterns
- [docs/INKSCAPE.md](docs/INKSCAPE.md) — CLI and PATH
- [docs/USAGE.md](docs/USAGE.md) — how to call tools
- [docs/AI_SAMPLING.md](docs/AI_SAMPLING.md) — SEP-1577 / agentic tools
- [docs/MCPB.md](docs/MCPB.md) — Claude Desktop `.mcpb` bundle
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — modules and transports
- [glama.json](glama.json) — Glama / discovery metadata
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md)

## Tools (summary)

| Tool | Role |
|------|------|
| `inkscape_file` | load, save, convert, info, validate, list_formats |
| `inkscape_vector` | trace, boolean, paths, QR/barcode, preview, mesh, units, … |
| `inkscape_analysis` | quality, statistics, validate, objects, dimensions, structure |
| `inkscape_system` | status, help, diagnostics, version, config, extensions |
| `list_local_models` | Ollama / LM Studio discovery |
| `generate_heraldry` | Heraldic SVG (e.g. trumponia) |
| `generate_svg`, `agentic_inkscape_workflow`, `intelligent_vector_processing`, `conversational_inkscape_assistant` | **Sampling hosts only** — see `docs/AI_SAMPLING.md` |

Full per-operation lists: **`llms-full.txt` § Tools**.

## Prompts and resources (MCP)

Registered URIs (FastMCP 3.1):

- **Prompts:** `prompt://inkscape/svg-file-workflow`, `vector-editing-workflow`, `analysis-workflow`, `sampling-agentic-workflow`, `heraldry-workflow`
- **Resources:** `resource://inkscape/capabilities`, `resource://inkscape/skills`

## Ports (fleet web stack)

| Service | Port | Notes |
|---------|------|--------|
| Vite dev UI (`web_sota`) | **10846** | Proxies `/api` and `/mcp` to backend |
| MCP HTTP + REST bridge | **10847** | `MCP_PORT`; MCP path default `/mcp` |

## Packaging

- **uv** + `pyproject.toml` — [docs/INSTALL.md](docs/INSTALL.md)
- **justfile** — `just test`, `just mcpb-pack`, etc.
- **MCPB** — `just mcpb-pack` → `dist/inkscape-mcp-v*.mcpb` (see [docs/MCPB.md](docs/MCPB.md))

## Maintainer / upstream

Repository: `https://github.com/sandraschi/inkscape-mcp` — MIT.
